title: PROMETHEUS
fullTitle: Predictive Reasoning and Omnichannel Modelling Engine for Tactical Horizon Evaluation and User Simulation
domain: AI-Powered Customer Digital Twins | Predictive Marketing Intelligence
description: Customer Futures Intelligence Platform creating continuously evolving AI Digital Twins for every customer. Transforms CRM from historical records into predictive intelligence with Monte Carlo campaign simulation.
overview: PROMETHEUS is a Customer Futures Intelligence Platform that creates continuously evolving AI Digital Twins for every customer. The platform continuously ingests omnichannel customer interactions and transforms them into living Digital Customer Twins capable of predicting churn risk, purchase intent, customer lifetime value, engagement probability, and campaign outcomes before decisions are executed. PROMETHEUS further extends intelligence through an agent-based simulation engine using Monte Carlo simulation.

features.label: AI Digital Customer Twins
features.description: Continuously evolving models capturing behavior, interests, sentiment, loyalty, engagement, and predicted future actions.

features.label: Omnichannel Intelligence
features.description: Unifies interactions across websites, CRM, email, support, mobile, and social into a single layer.

features.label: Real-Time Event Processing
features.description: Kafka-driven event architecture processing interactions continuously.

features.label: Predictive Intelligence Engine
features.description: Forecasts churn, purchase intent, engagement, sentiment evolution, and lifetime value.

features.label: Monte Carlo Campaign Simulation
features.description: Digital Twins converted into autonomous agents for probabilistic campaign simulation.

features.label: Semantic Customer Memory
features.description: Vectorized memories with semantic retrieval using high-dimensional embeddings in Qdrant.

features.label: Fatigue-Aware Personalization
features.description: Models communication fatigue and channel affinity for optimal engagement.

features.label: Executive Intelligence Dashboard
features.description: Real-time customer health, churn risk, campaign performance, and predictive metrics.

algorithms.name: Digital Twin Construction
algorithms.description: Customer interactions aggregated into behavior profiles, interest graphs, sentiment trajectories.

algorithms.name: Churn Prediction (Ensemble)
algorithms.description: LightGBM + XGBoost ensemble identifying at-risk customers.

algorithms.name: Customer Lifetime Value
algorithms.description: Quantile regression with confidence intervals for revenue projection.

algorithms.name: Monte Carlo Simulation
algorithms.description: Thousands of probabilistic simulation runs for campaign forecasting.

algorithms.name: Semantic Memory (Qdrant)
algorithms.description: Vector embeddings for similarity search and contextual memory retrieval.

modules.name: Event Ingestion Layer
modules.responsibility: Customer events from CRM, web, email, support, mobile, social

modules.name: Customer Intelligence Layer
modules.responsibility: Builds and maintains Digital Customer Twins

modules.name: Prediction Layer
modules.responsibility: Churn, intent, LTV, recommendation, segmentation inference

modules.name: Memory Layer
modules.responsibility: Vector embeddings and semantic customer memory retrieval

modules.name: Simulation Layer
modules.responsibility: Agent creation, Monte Carlo execution, scenario forecasting

modules.name: Analytics Layer
modules.responsibility: KPI aggregation, dashboards, reporting, executive intelligence

results: End-to-end AI Customer Digital Twin platform delivered
Supports 100,000+ customers and 10M+ events per day
Churn prediction, intent forecasting, and LTV estimation integrated
Monte Carlo campaign simulation engine operational
Transforms CRM from historical records into predictive intelligence
